root_cause: StatefulSet rollout references a missing volumeClaimTemplate
evidence: Pod ledger-db-0 is owned by StatefulSet ledger-db
Pod references ordinal PVC data-ledger-db-0 for volume data
StatefulSet ledger-db has no volumeClaimTemplate named data
Recent storage signal: MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "data" : persistentvolumeclaim "data-ledger-db-0" not found

causes.message: StatefulSet 'ledger-db' is expected to provide per-pod storage identities across ordinals
StatefulSet 'ledger-db' is missing volumeClaimTemplate 'data' required to generate PVC 'data-ledger-db-0'
The StatefulSet controller cannot materialize the expected per-ordinal PVC for the Pod
Pod startup is blocked because the expected StatefulSet storage claim does not exist

likely_causes: The StatefulSet spec references an ordinal-style PVC name but the matching volumeClaimTemplate was never defined
A copied or hand-edited StatefulSet manifest mixes explicit claim names with template-based storage semantics
A rollout introduced storage naming drift between Pod volumes and StatefulSet volumeClaimTemplates
suggested_checks: Compare StatefulSet spec.volumeClaimTemplates with Pod volume claim names and ordinal naming
Use volumeClaimTemplates for per-replica PVC generation instead of hardcoding ordinal claim names
